productDisplayName: Fossil Men Hood Traveller Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this Midway wallet from fossil is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Fossil perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Comes in a vintage style tin.Dimensions: 12 cm x 9 cmOne main compartment on a textured upper with embossed brandingTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideA flap on the left side with id slots on both sidesFour card holder slots under the flap and three slots on the rightA zippered pocket on the spine of the walletCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
